verses.text: “Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh itin ama hong thuhilhna, a thukhamte, a ngeina kipte, a thupiakte na zui tawntung ding uh hi
Tuni-in ngaihsun un (a thei nailo, a mu nailo na tate uh tungah a gen hilo ka hih ciangin), Topa note' Pasian' hong thuhilhna, ama liatna, a vangliatna leh a thahatna
Egypt kumpipa Faro leh a leitang tung khempeuhah a hih Egypt gam sunga ama limte leh a sepnate
Egypt galkapte, a sakolte leh a leengte tungah a hihte; note hong delh laitakin San Tuipi tawh amaute tuumsakin, tuni dongin Topa in amaute a suksiatna
hih mun na tun' ma sungtengun sehnel gamah amah in note tungah hong hihte
Reuben' tapa Eliab, a tapa Dathan leh Abiram-te tungah a hihte; leitang a kam ka-in Israel khempeuh lakah a innkuanpihte, a puanbukte leh amau a zuite khempeuh tawh amaute a nawmvalhna ngaihsun un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' hihsa a nasepna a liante khempeuh na mitte un mu khin hi.

“Tua ahih ciangin note thahatin, na luah ding uh leitangah va pai-in na luah theihna ding uh leh, Topa in na pu na pate uh leh a suanlekhakte uh tungah piak dingin a kiciam, bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na gamah sauvei na nuntak theihna dingun tuni-a kong gen thupiakna khempeuh na zui ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh luah dinga na lutna ding uh leitang pen note' hong paikhiatna, anteh cin'na huan banga khaici vawhin tui na buahna dingun nakpi takin na semin tui na lakna uh Egypt leitang tawh kibanglo hi
Note va pai-in na luah ding uh leitang pen, vantung panin guahtui a ngah mual leh guam a omna leitang
Topa na Pasian un a kep leitang hi a, kum kipata kipan kum bei dongin Topa note' Pasian in tua leitang en tawntung hi
“ Topa na Pasian uh itin, na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh ama na na sepna dingun tuni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate na zuih uh leh
na an uh leh na leenggahzu uh leh na sathau uh na kaihkhop theihna dingun amah in guah masa leh guah nunung, a hunin na leitang uh-a' dingin hong zusak ding hi
Amah in na ganhingte uh-a' dingin na gamsung uhah lopa hong posak ding a, note in zong an ne-in na gil uh vah ding hi
Midangte' hong khemna hangin note kihei-in pasian dangte' na semin tuate na biakkhak lohna dingun kingaihsun un

Tua hi kei leh no tungah Topa hong hehin guah zulo ding a, leitang in bangmah piangsak loin, Topa in no hong piak leitang hoihah manlangin na siat pak theihna dingun amah in vantungte khakcip khading hi
“Tua ahih ciangin hih ka thugente na lungsim uhah ciamtehin na ngaihsun ding uh hi. Na khut tung uhah lim dingin na khih ding uh a, tuate pen na mitte uh kikalah talsuan hi ding hi
Na tate uh tungah na hilh ding uh a, na innsung uhah na lut laitak, lampi-ah na pai laitak, na lup ciang uh leh na thawh ciangun tuate genin na nei ding uh hi

Vantungte, leitung' tungah a om laiteng, amaute tungah piak dingin Topa in na pu na pate uh tungah a kiciam gam sungah note leh na tate uh khan' a sau theihna dingin na inn kongkhak khuam uh leh na kongpite uh tungah tuate na gelh ding uh hi
“Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama lampi khempeuh zui-in, amah beelin, nomau zuih dingin kong gen hih thupiakna khempeuh zuih ding na kingaihsut uh leh
Topa in na mai uhah a om hih minamte khempeuh hawlkhia ding a, note sangin lianzaw-in a thahatzaw minamte na suankhia ding uh hi
Na khe un a sikna mun khempeuh nomau-a' hi ding hi. Na gamgi uh sehnel gam panin Lebanon ciangdong leh Eufratis gun panin nitumna tuipi dong hi ding hi
Na lang uhah kuamah pang zolo ding hi. No tungah hong ciam bangin Topa na Pasian un na tot ding uh gam khempeuh tungah note hong kizahtakna leh note hong kikihtakna tungsak ding hi
“En un, tuni-in na mai uhah thupha khat leh hamsia khat ka koih hi
Tuni-a kong gen, Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate na zuih uh leh thupha hi a
Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate mangloin, na theih nailoh uh pasian dangte' nungzui dingin tuni-a no kong thupiakna panin na kiheikhiat uh leh hamsia ahi hi
Luah dingin na lutna uh leitangah Topa na Pasian un hong paipih ciangin Gerizim Mual tungah thupha taangko-in, Ebal Mual tungah hamsia na taangko ding uh hi
(Tua mualte, Jordan gal, lampi panin nitumna lam, Moreh tawsaw gei-a Gilgal galkhat, Arabah-ah a teng Kanaan mite' gam sungah om hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang a luah dingin Jordan kantanin a pai ding na hi uh hi. Tua leitang luahin a sungah na ten' uh ciangin
tuni-a note kong piak thukhamte leh ngeina kipte khempeuh na zuih ding uh limtakin na ngaihsun ding uh hi.
